_meta.resume_note: Pinned to El Camino College's official 2025-2026 catalog. Biology, AS is published as a transfer-major degree without a fixed institutional course table; that source limitation is preserved explicitly.

degrees.catalog_status_seen: Published in the official 2025-2026 catalog with no inactive or teach-out language.

major_groups.label_seen: Preparation for the Biology Transfer Major
major_groups.choice_structure_seen: The catalog does not publish a fixed El Camino course list. It requires completion of the requirements of a biology transfer major and directs students to a transfer curriculum guide, counselor, or Transfer Center for the destination-specific courses.

major_groups.label_seen: Associate degree general education and electives to reach 60 units
major_groups.ge_area: Applicable El Camino associate-degree or transfer general education pattern

degrees.notes: This is a real published AS, but the 2025-2026 catalog intentionally defines its major by the selected four-year destination's biology transfer requirements rather than an El Camino-wide fixed course block. No courses were inferred from a different catalog year or destination. Human review should attach the intended transfer-major guide before using this row for course-level coverage.

notes: The official 2025-2026 catalog publishes one in-scope Biology award and no Biology AS-T or AA. General Science and Human Biosciences awards are outside this pass.
